description_long: This is a tall, slender obelisk with a sharply pointed tip, standing on a multi-tiered rectangular base. The shaft is smooth and tapers gradually towards the top, with one face (view 2) featuring two vertical recessed lines and a small circular indentation near the tip, possibly for decorative or symbolic purposes. The base consists of several stacked rectangular layers, each slightly smaller than the one below, giving the structure a stepped appearance. The surface appears to be made of dark stone or concrete, with a matte, slightly rough finish. There are no visible inscriptions or elaborate ornamentation, lending the obelisk a minimalist and solemn aesthetic. The overall design is reminiscent of commemorative monuments commonly found in urban parks or plazas.
description: A tall, dark, minimalist obelisk with a pointed tip and a stepped rectangular base, featuring a smooth shaft and subtle vertical recesses on one side.
description_view_0: Front view shows a smooth, unadorned shaft and the stepped rectangular base.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same smooth shaft and base, with no visible recesses or decorations.
description_view_2: Rear view displays two vertical recessed lines and a small circular indentation near the tip, distinguishing it from other sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the smooth, unadorned appearance of the front and left sides.
attribute_base_design: The base is a multi-tiered, rectangular structure with several stacked layers, each slightly smaller than the one below, creating a stepped effect. The design is simple and solid, with no visible decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed, forming a classic obelisk pyramidion with a smooth finish and no additional decoration.
